productDisplayName: Fila Men Strings Black Casual Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with the finest fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This Strings shoe from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The colour block styling, low-top cut and synthetic upper showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. Wear these with corduroy trousers and a polo T-shirt, or with your favourite jeans and a black tee.UpperSleek synthetic leather upper with concentric stitch detailing on the toe boxCentral lace upsPadded tongueReinforced overlays on the toe box and heel collarMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleTPR outsole with round suction points on the big toe and heelConcentric grooves around the suction pointsCurved midfootShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
